slides.title: Coffee without the *jitters or crash*.
slides.sub: L-theanine — the calming compound in tea — smooths caffeine into clean, steady focus.

slides.title: Caffeine alone overshoots
slides.body: Coffee on its own can spike *anxiety and jitters*, then drop you into an afternoon crash.

slides.title: Meet L-theanine
slides.body: *L-theanine*, an amino acid in green tea, promotes calm focus without making you drowsy.

slides.title: Calm meets alert
slides.body: Paired with caffeine, theanine smooths the edge — you get the *focus without the buzz*.

slides.title: Aim for a pairing
slides.body: A common combo is *~200mg theanine* with your usual coffee, or simply brew strong green tea.

slides.title: Just drink green tea
slides.body: Green tea already contains *both compounds* — matcha is an easy, built-in version of the stack.

slides.title: Sharper focus, *steadier mood*.
slides.body: Log your coffee, energy, and sleep in Vibe Health and watch your daily Health Score show how your focus habits actually feel.

caption:
L-theanine plus caffeine is the calm, focused energy coffee alone never gives you. ☕

Theanine (in green tea) smooths out the jitters and crash — pair ~200mg with your coffee, or just drink matcha. 🔖

Log your coffee, energy, and sleep in Vibe Health and see how your focus actually feels → link in bio.
youtube_title: Coffee Without the Jitters or Crash

bg_prompts.cover: Black-and-white cinematic editorial photograph. Dramatic low-key lighting, deep shadows, dark charcoal background. Realistic texture, shallow depth of field. A person holding a warm cup of coffee beside a glass of green tea on a kitchen counter in dim morning light.
